attachment.content:
- frontend-design:frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

package cerbos

type Resource string

type Action string

const (
	ALL                                         Action = "*"
	REPLACE_SIM                                 Action = "replace-sim"
	CHANGE_SERVICE_NAME                         Action = "change-service-name"
	UPDATE_SIM_SETTINGS                         Action = "update-sim-settings"
	ACTIVATE_SIM                                Action = "activate-sim"
	PORT_OUT                                    Action = "port-out"
	PORT_VALIDATE_PAC                           Action = "port-validate-pac"
	SUBMIT_CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE                Action = "submit-contract-renewal-date"
	REFUND_ADMIN_FEE                            Action = "refund-admin-fee"
	SUBMIT_QUOTE                                Action = "submit-quote"
	GENERATE_AND_EMAIL_CONTRACT                 Action = "generate-and-email-contract"
	TERMINATE_SERVICE_MP_0050                   Action = "terminate-service-mp0050"
	TERMINATE_SERVICE_MP_0600                   Action = "terminate-service-mp0600"
	EMAIL_CONTRACT                              Action = "email-contract"
	GET_UPGRADE_AVAILABLE_QUOTE                 Action = "get-upgrade-available-quote"
	GET_ACCOUNT                                 Action = "get-account"
	GET_SERVICES                                Action = "get-services"
	GET_SIM_SETTINGS                            Action = "get-sim-settings"
	GET_BALANCE                                 Action = "get-balance"
	GET_CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE                   Action = "get-contract-renewal-date"
	GET_SERVICE_HISTORY                         Action = "get-service-history"

	TOPUP_COMPLETE                              Action = "topup-complete"

	ROAMING_LIMIT_GET_USAGE_RATINGS             Action = "get-usage-ratings"
	ROAMING_LIMIT_GET_EU_ROAMINGS_EVENTS        Action = "get-eu-roamings-events"
	ROAMING_LIMIT_GET_ALERT_COMMS               Action = "get-alert-comms"
	ROAMING_LIMIT_GENERATE_DAILY_ROAMING_CHARGE Action = "generate-daily-roaming-charge"
	ROAMING_LIMIT_CREATE_TEST_TRANSACTIONS      Action = "create-test-transactions"
	QUOTING_ACCESS_MOBILE_BROADBAND_TARIFFS     Action = "access-mobile-broadband-tariffs"
	CANCEL_REPLACE_ESIM                         Action = "cancel-replace-esim"
	GET_ROAMING_USAGE                           Action = "get-roaming-usage"
	SHOW_PROMO_AND_CURRENT_TARIFFS              Action = "show-promo-and-current-tariffs"
	GET_BARRED_SIM                              Action = "get-barred-sim"
	GET_EXISTING_HELD_REPLACEMENT               Action = "get-existing-held-replacement"
	RELEASE_EXISTING_HELD_REPLACEMENT           Action = "release-existing-held-replacement"
	CHECK_CAN_ORDER_REPLACEMENT_ESIM            Action = "check-can-order-replacement-esim"
	OVERRIDE_REPLACEMENT_SIM_LOCKOUT            Action = "override-replacement-sim-lockout"
	RESEND_ESIM_ACTIVATION                      Action = "resend-esim-activation"
	GET_AVAILABLE_HANDSETS                      Action = "get-available-handsets"
)

var actions = map[string]Action{
	"*":                                 ALL,
	"replace-sim":                       REPLACE_SIM,
	"change-service-name":               CHANGE_SERVICE_NAME,
	"update-sim-settings":               UPDATE_SIM_SETTINGS,
	"activate-sim":                      ACTIVATE_SIM,
	"port-out":                          PORT_OUT,
	"port-validate-pac":                 PORT_VALIDATE_PAC,
	"submit-contract-renewal-date":      SUBMIT_CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE,
	"refund-admin-fee":                  REFUND_ADMIN_FEE,
	"submit-quote":                      SUBMIT_QUOTE,
	"generate-and-email-contract":       GENERATE_AND_EMAIL_CONTRACT,
	"terminate-service-mp0050":          TERMINATE_SERVICE_MP_0050,
	"terminate-service-mp0600":          TERMINATE_SERVICE_MP_0600,
	"email-contract":                    EMAIL_CONTRACT,
	"get-upgrade-available-quote":       GET_UPGRADE_AVAILABLE_QUOTE,
	"get-services":                      GET_SERVICES,
	"get-sim-settings":                  GET_SIM_SETTINGS,
	"get-balance":                       GET_BALANCE,
	"get-contract-renewal-date":         GET_CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE,
	"get-service-history":               GET_SERVICE_HISTORY,
	"get-address":                       GET_ADDRESS,
	"faults-view":                       FAULTS_VIEW,
	"faults-manage":                     FAULTS_MANAGE,
	"manage-sim":                        MANAGE_SIM,
	"topup-refund-balance":              TOPUP_REFUND_BALANCE,
	"upgrade-quote":                     UPGRADE_QUOTE,
	"download-contract":                 DOWNLOAD_CONTRACT,
	"get-contract":                      GET_CONTRACT,
	"generate-verification-code":        GENERATE_VERIFICATION_CODE,
	"topup-request":                     TOPUP_REQUEST,
	"topup-complete":                    TOPUP_COMPLETE,
	"blacklist-handset":                 BLACKLIST_HANDSET,
	"port-in":                           PORT_IN,
	"get-quote":                         GET_QUOTE,
	"get-service-usage":                 GET_SERVICE_USAGE,
	"get-service-usage-history":         GET_SERVICE_USAGE_HISTORY,
	"get-handset-info":                  GET_HANDSET_INFO,
	"test-local-dev":                    TEST_LOCAL_DEV,
	"create":                            MSO_CREATE,
	"view":                              MSO_VIEW,
	"calculate-etf":                     CALCULATE_ETF,
	"get-termination-prompts":           GET_TERMINATION_PROMPTS,
	"get-usage-ratings":                 ROAMING_LIMIT_GET_USAGE_RATINGS,
	"get-eu-roamings-events":            ROAMING_LIMIT_GET_EU_ROAMINGS_EVENTS,
	"get-alert-comms":                   ROAMING_LIMIT_GET_ALERT_COMMS,
	"generate-daily-roaming-charge":     ROAMING_LIMIT_GENERATE_DAILY_ROAMING_CHARGE,
	"create-test-transactions":          ROAMING_LIMIT_CREATE_TEST_TRANSACTIONS,
	"cancel-replace-esim":               CANCEL_REPLACE_ESIM,
	"get-roaming-usage":                 GET_ROAMING_USAGE,
	"show-promo-and-current-tariffs":    SHOW_PROMO_AND_CURRENT_TARIFFS,
	"get-barred-sim":                    GET_BARRED_SIM,
	"get-existing-held-replacement":     GET_EXISTING_HELD_REPLACEMENT,
	"release-existing-held-replacement": RELEASE_EXISTING_HELD_REPLACEMENT,
	"override-replacement-sim-lockout":  OVERRIDE_REPLACEMENT_SIM_LOCKOUT,
	string(RESEND_ESIM_ACTIVATION):      RESEND_ESIM_ACTIVATION,
	"get-available-handsets":            GET_AVAILABLE_HANDSETS,
}

func GetActionByName(name string) Action {
	return actions[name]
}

content.text: Let me also see how it's used in the service.

input.description: Show how cerbos authorization is called in public-graphql

content.text:
Here's how it works in this codebase:

**Cerbos** is a policy decision point (PDP) — it evaluates "can principal X do action Y on resource Z?" against externally managed policies.

In this project:

1. **`pkg/auth/cerbos/cerbos.go`** — just a typed registry of known `Action` strings (e.g. `replace-sim`, `get-balance`). No logic, just constants.

2. **`pkg/auth/authorizer.go`** — wraps the `uwos-go/iam/pdp` client. Every auth check calls `pdp.Client.Single().Authorize(ctx, principal, action, resource)` and checks the result.

3. The **principal** (who's asking) comes from the request context — it can be a Staff member, Customer, or Machine (k8s service account).

4. The **resource** is a typed string (e.g. a service kind) + a resource ID.

5. The `Authorizer` interface exposes 4 methods depending on who you expect the caller to be:
   - `AuthorizeStaff` / `AuthorizeCustomer` / `AuthorizeMachine` — specific principal type, returns their identity on success
   - `AuthorizeAnyPrincipal` — doesn't care who, just allow/deny

The policies themselves live externally in the Cerbos server — this code just sends the check and reacts to allow/deny.
